goal: Review the current battle/card system against the 2026-04-08 numeric and three-tier principles, then report the key mismatches without changing gameplay code.
constraints: Do not modify gameplay code, card data, or balance values.
Do not rewrite story, UI, or community systems as part of this task.
Limit edits to the task file and any task-generated metadata needed by the workflow.
Ground findings in the current repository state and cite the relevant files.
deliverables: A concise review of where the current implementation differs from the 2026-04-08 balance principles.
Concrete file-level references for the main mismatches.
A recommendation for which current code should stay and which design rules should still follow 2026-04-08.
